dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used dc_upper (Donchian upper band) as proxy for 52-week high detection. The 52-week lookback period is implicit in standard Donchian calculation. vol_ratio_20 represents volume relative to 20-day average. RSI threshold of 60 indicates momentum confirmation. Added sustained close condition (close > prev_close) to approximate the 1-bar confirmation requirement. Exit uses close below sma_20 as primary exit and 7% stop loss as secondary.

backtest_rule.reason: Used dc_upper (Donchian upper band) as proxy for 52-week high detection. The 52-week lookback period is implicit in standard Donchian calculation. vol_ratio_20 represents volume relative to 20-day average. RSI threshold of 60 indicates momentum confirmation. Added sustained close condition (close > prev_close) to approximate the 1-bar confirmation requirement. Exit uses close below sma_20 as primary exit and 7% stop loss as secondary.

source_rule_text: Buy stocks when they reach new highs, not when they are near their lows or consolidation levels, as this correlates with superior market performance.
